q_quant_rationale: The analysis compares campaign vs non-campaign days (a within-data contrast), not against an expected/baseline/typical value external to the observed groups, so it fails criterion (a).
q_aware_rationale: The values (6.259 vs 6.722, n=293 vs 72, +0.463/+7.4%) are correctly summarized and a verdict of inconclusive/too-weak-to-confirm is given.
